sentence_reviews.text: Diffusion and score-based models learn to reverse a staged corruption process, synthesizing samples by iterative denoising or integration of a learned score field.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Ho, Jain & Abbeel 2020, DDPM abstract and method.
sentence_reviews.notes: Iterative denoising/reversing corruption is directly supported by DDPM; score-field integration is score-based-model wording not directly covered by the DDPM citation alone.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Diffusion & score-based models is to connect Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption, Score matching & denoising score objectives to downstream capabilities including Image generation, editing & design, Video generation & simulation synthesis, Speech synthesis, voice & music generation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDPM image generation; PML score/latent-variable background; U-Net architecture source.
sentence_reviews.notes: Image generation and denoising objectives are supported; video and speech downstream roles are not directly evidenced by the packet sources.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Image generation, editing & design
sentence_reviews.notes: Image generation is supported; editing/design is a downstream generalization.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Video generation & simulation synthesis
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited packet source does not directly support video generation or simulation synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Speech synthesis, voice & music generation
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited packet source does not directly support speech, voice, or music generation.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption, Score matching & denoising score objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDPM method and objective; PML probabilistic modeling topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported at a high level; broad limitation wording is generic and not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.text: Diffusion & score-based models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDPM forward diffusion and learned reverse denoising process.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for DDPM-style diffusion models.

sentence_reviews.text: Diffusion & score-based models is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Score matching & denoising score objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDPM denoising objective; PML score/denoising score background.
sentence_reviews.notes: DDPM objective is closely related to denoising score matching; exact score-matching wording is synthesized across sources.

sentence_reviews.text: Diffusion & score-based models extends or specializes the architecture family U-Nets & encoder–decoder convnets.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDPM architecture usage and U-Net source.
sentence_reviews.notes: U-Nets are commonly used denoisers, but diffusion models do not generally specialize U-Net architectures.

sentence_reviews.text: Diffusion & score-based models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Reparameterization & differentiable sampling.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDPM stochastic reverse sampling; PML stochastic latent-variable methods.
sentence_reviews.notes: Stochastic sampling is core, but reparameterization/differentiable sampling is not established as a direct architectural component by the cited DDPM evidence.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/core is directly supported by DDPM.
optimizes_for/core is defensible for denoising score/diffusion objectives.
U-Net is a common denoiser architecture, but 'specializes' is too strong for diffusion models generally.
Sampling is necessary, but the cited evidence does not show reparameterization/differentiable sampling as a standard dependency.
